analysis.reasoning: Core message: China and Tanzania held an online conference to share experiences using traditional medicine against COVID-19 and pledged to strengthen cooperation in applying traditional medicine to treat diseases. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not mentioned; no contrast with the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—emphasizes China's cooperative stance, knowledge-sharing, and commitment to joint health efforts with another country, fitting the benevolent, mutually beneficial international role. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestically): Not addressed; no discussion of governance or domestic values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claim of domestic achievements or leadership superiority; focus is on cooperation, not showcasing CCP success. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not about culture or tourism. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2 only.
